parameters.query: SELECT id, site_url, country_code, proxy_url, proxy_type FROM scan_targets WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY country_code, site_url

WITH our_match AS (
  SELECT t.ad_id, (elem->>'position')::int AS pos
  FROM teasers t,
  jsonb_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($json.teasers).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb) elem
  WHERE t.ad_id IS NOT NULL
    AND t.ad_id::text = elem->>'media_id'
  LIMIT 1
)
INSERT INTO position_tracking (site_url, ad_id, position, total_teasers_in_block, competitor_titles)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.site_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  (SELECT ad_id FROM our_match),
  (SELECT pos FROM our_match),
  {{ $json.teasers_found }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ block_ids: $json.block_ids, teasers: $json.teasers, country_code: $json.country_code }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
);

INSERT INTO position_tracking (site_url, ad_id, position, total_teasers_in_block, competitor_titles)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.site_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULL,
  NULL,
  0,
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ widget_found: false, block_ids: [], country_code: $json.country_code, error: $json.error || "no widget" }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
);

parameters.query: SELECT media_id, title, destination_url, 'competitor' as source FROM competitors WHERE site_url = '{{ $json.site_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' UNION ALL SELECT ad_id as media_id, title, NULL as destination_url, 'ours' as source FROM teasers WHERE ad_id IS NOT NULL

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 14; SM-S918B) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/122.0.6261.64 Mobile Safari/537.36

parameters.query:
WITH upsert AS (
  UPDATE competitors SET
    last_seen_at = NOW(),
    times_seen = times_seen + 1,
    media_id = COALESCE({{ $json.media_id || 'NULL' }}, media_id),
    position = {{ $json.position || 0 }},
    image_url = COALESCE({{ $json.image_url ? "'" + $json.image_url.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}, image_url),
    destination_url = COALESCE({{ $json.landing_url && !['resolve_failed','blocked_by_antifraud'].includes($json.landing_url) ? "'" + $json.landing_url.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}, destination_url),
    block_id = COALESCE({{ $json.geozo_block_id || 'NULL' }}, block_id),
    landing_domain = COALESCE({{ $json.landing_domain ? "'" + $json.landing_domain.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }}, landing_domain),
    geozo_ad_id = COALESCE({{ $json.geozo_ad_id || 'NULL' }}, geozo_ad_id),
    geozo_adgroup_id = COALESCE({{ $json.geozo_adgroup_id || 'NULL' }}, geozo_adgroup_id),
    geozo_site_id = COALESCE({{ $json.geozo_site_id || 'NULL' }}, geozo_site_id),
    country_code = COALESCE({{ $json.country_code ? "'" + $json.country_code + "'" : "NULL" }}, country_code),
    cost = COALESCE({{ $json.cost || 'NULL' }}, cost)
  WHERE site_url = '{{ $json.site_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    AND title = '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  RETURNING id
)
INSERT INTO competitors (media_id, site_url, title, image_url, destination_url, position, block_id, landing_domain, geozo_ad_id, geozo_adgroup_id, geozo_site_id, country_code, cost)
SELECT
  {{ $json.media_id || 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.site_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.image_url ? "'" + $json.image_url.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.landing_url && !['resolve_failed','blocked_by_antifraud'].includes($json.landing_url) ? "'" + $json.landing_url.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.position || 0 }},
  {{ $json.geozo_block_id || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.landing_domain ? "'" + $json.landing_domain.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.geozo_ad_id || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.geozo_adgroup_id || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.geozo_site_id || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.country_code ? "'" + $json.country_code + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.cost || 'NULL' }}
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM upsert);
